title: Which Angel Abilities Would You Want
display_title: Which Angel Abilities Would You Want
wikitext:
[]: Which Angel Abilities Would You Want?             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Jan 09, 2010 3:03 am If you could pick only two powers, abilities or traits of two of the Angels, which ones would you pick? They can range from ATF or optic blasts, to more specific abilities unique to the Angel. I would pick Ramiel's beam and Arael's mind rape.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 09, 2010 3:20 am I'd definitely go for the AT Field and Sachiel's arm-hammer-thing in which it uses to crack through Unit-01's skull.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Sat Jan 09, 2010 3:24 am Hm... Merging abilities (assuming I could de-merge) like Armisael, and adaptation like Iruel. Hehehe... Edit: I think this could develop into a very interesting RP, assuming there were some veeeeeeeeeeeeery tight restrictions to prevent godmodding... Anyone want in?

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Sat Jan 09, 2010 4:25 am Leliel, to confuse everyone's perception of space time. That or Kaworu's ability to manipulate people with his charm.

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Sat Jan 09, 2010 5:20 am Eye beams and Ramiel's more powerful concentrated energy blast for those fortified targets.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sat Jan 09, 2010 6:08 am AT Field, and the 5th Angels ability to DRILL! I could strike oil and be rich.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 09, 2010 7:44 am Arael's mind rape and Sachiel's hand laser thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Sat Jan 09, 2010 11:02 am AT field and Ireul's computer controlling ability

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sat Jan 09, 2010 12:25 pm AT Field, and Adam's ability to create other angels to do my dirty work.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Jan 09, 2010 12:27 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Arael's mind rape and Sachiel's hand laser thing.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 09, 2010 12:45 pm The oft-overlooked power possessed by all Angels, that gives them total control over the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sat Jan 09, 2010 1:04 pm esselfortium wrote: The oft-overlooked power possessed by all Angels, that gives them total control over the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 09, 2010 1:20 pm Starasp wrote: How do you control RL with that? There is no plot here.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Sat Jan 09, 2010 1:25 pm Sachi wrote: Starasp wrote: How do you control RL with that? There is no plot here.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 09, 2010 2:18 pm Starasp wrote: esselfortium wrote: The oft-overlooked power possessed by all Angels, that gives them total control over the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jan 09, 2010 2:54 pm I would want Giant Naked Rei's abilities to be both giant and naked.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Jan 09, 2010 4:34 pm Kaworu's AT field since it was stated to have the strongest AT field IIRC?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Jan 09, 2010 6:08 pm Nope, Rei's was.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sat Jan 09, 2010 10:17 pm All the powers Zeruel has. How can you go wrong with razor arms?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Jan 10, 2010 12:11 am I would want Shamshell's giant penis-head. Can you imagine the epic orgasm that would ensue if Shamshell thrust himself inside of GNR's 3rd-Eyegina?
